POST-LAB 9 QUESTIONS (2 points) Last Name: _______________________ First Name: _______________________ 1. Match the structure with the corresponding description. (0.5 point) Name of Structure Description No. of structure 1. ureters Area where renal vessels and ureters converge 2. kidney urination 3. renal capsule nephrons located deep in the renal medullas 4. micturition smooth muscle of the bladder 5. rugae of the mucosa organ of urine production 6. hilum includes Bowman’s capsule and glomerulus 7. collecting duct folds in the bladder when empty 8. detrusor a structure where nephrons drain urine into 9. renal capsule collagen membrane around the kidney 10. juxtamedullary nephrons tubules that conduct urine from the kidney to bladder 2. Write down
